    purrr::list_rbind()

                    		
                  

                  

                    73
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                
              

            

            

              

                
                  

                    1
                    
                    
                      
#' Review blogposts views for Throwback Thursday highlights

                    		
                  

                  

                    2
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    3
                    
                    
                      
#' Use [matomo_update()] and friends to download and update blog post view data.

                    		
                  

                  

                    4
                    
                    
                      
#' `tt_review()` summarizes the posts by view and optionally filters to a

                    		
                  

                  

                    5
                    
                    
                      
#' specific month.

                    		
                  

                  

                    6
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    7
                    
                    
                      
#' @param which_month Numeric. Which month to return? Numeric 1-12 for month.

                    		
                  

                  

                    8
                    
                    
                      
#'   Default `NULL` returns all.

                    		
                  

                  

                    9
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    10
                    
                    
                      
#' @returns Data frame of posts by views with urls

                    		
                  

                  

                    11
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    12
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    13
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    14
                    
                    
                      
#' @examplesIf dir.exists(matomo_dir())

                    		
                  

                  

                    15
                    
                    
                      
#' tt_review(11)

                    		
                  

                  

                    16
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    17
                    
                    
                      
tt_review <- function(which_month = NULL) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    18
                    1x
                    
                      
  blogviews <- matomo_read() |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    19
                    1x
                    
                      
    matomo_blogposts() |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    20
                    1x
                    
                      
    dplyr::mutate(url = paste0("https://ropensci.org", .data$label)) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    21
                    1x
                    
                      
    dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(.data$nb_visits)) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    22
                    1x
                    
                      
    dplyr::filter(

                    		
                  

                  

                    23
                    1x
                    
                      
      !stringr::str_detect(.data$label, "news-digest|news-"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    24
                    1x
                    
                      
      !stringr::str_detect(.data$label, "/technotes/")

                    		
                  

                  

                    25
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    26
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    27
                    1x
                    
                      
  if (!is.null(which_month)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    28
                    !
                    
                      
    blogviews <- dplyr::filter(

                    		
                  

                  

                    29
                    !
                    
                      
      blogviews,

                    		
                  

                  

                    30
                    !
                    
                      
      lubridate::month(.data$post_date) == .env$which_month

                    		
                  

                  

                    31
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    32
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    33
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    34
                    1x
                    
                      
  blogviews |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    35
                    1x
                    
                      
    dplyr::select(-"label", -"post_month") |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    36
                    1x
                    
                      
    print(n = Inf)

                    		
                  

                  

                    37
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    38
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    39
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    40
                    
                    
                      
#' Create Throwback Thursday `socials_post_issue()` command

                    		
                  

                  

                    41
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    42
                    
                    
                      
#' @param date YMD Character. Date of the original post.

                    		
                  

                  

                    43
                    
                    
                      
#' @param title Character. Title of the original post.

                    		
                  

                  

                    44
                    
                    
                      
#' @param url Character. URL to original blog post

                    		
                  

                  

                    45
                    
                    
                      
#' @param blurb Character. Interesting bit to describe post (optional).

                    		
                  

                  

                    46
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    47
                    
                    
                      
#' @inheritParams common_docs

                    		
                  

                  

                    48
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    49
                    
                    
                      
#' @returns Character string of R functions with relevant details (normally

                    		
                  

                  

                    50
                    
                    
                      
#'   pasted into a POSTS_TT.R script file and tweaked as necessary before being

                    		
                  

                  

                    51
                    
                    
                      
#'   executed).

                    		
                  

                  

                    52
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    53
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    54
                    
                    
                      
#' @examples

                    		
                  

                  

                    55
                    
                    
                      
#' # Standard

                    		
                  

                  

                    56
                    
                    
                      
#' tt_post(

                    		
                  

                  

                    57
                    
                    
                      
#'   "2019-05-14",

                    		
                  

                  

                    58
                    
                    
                      
#'   "POWER to the People",

                    		
                  

                  

                    59
                    
                    
                      
#'   "https://ropensci.org/blog/2019/05/14/nasapower/",

                    		
                  

                  

                    60
                    
                    
                      
#'   print = TRUE

                    		
                  

                  

                    61
                    
                    
                      
#' )

                    		
                  

                  

                    62
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    63
                    
                    
                      
#' # Double throwback

                    		
                  

                  

                    64
                    
                    
                      
#' tt_post(

                    		
                  

                  

                    65
                    
                    
                      
#'   c("2017-08-22", "2017-08-22"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    66
                    
                    
                      
#'   c("So you (don’t) think you can review a package",

                    		
                  

                  

                    67
                    
                    
                      
#'     "Onboarding visdat, a tool for preliminary visualisation of whole dataframes"

                    		
                  

                  

                    68
                    
                    
                      
#'   ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    69
                    
                    
                      
#'   url = c(

                    		
                  

                  

                    70
                    
                    
                      
#'     "https://ropensci.org/blog/2017/08/22/first-package-review/",

                    		
                  

                  

                    71
                    
                    
                      
#'     "https://ropensci.org/blog/2017/08/22/visdat/"

                    		
                  

                  

                    72
                    
                    
                      
#'   ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    73
                    
                    
                      
#'   print = TRUE

                    		
                  

                  

                    74
                    
                    
                      
#' )

                    		
                  

                  

                    75
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    76
                    
                    
                      
#' # Slug only

                    		
                  

                  

                    77
                    
                    
                      
#' tt_post("2019-05-14", "POWER to the People", "nasapower", print = TRUE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    78
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    79
                    
                    
                      
tt_post <- function(

                    		
                  

                  

                    80
                    
                    
                      
  date,

                    		
                  

                  

                    81
                    
                    
                      
  title,

                    		
                  

                  

                    82
                    
                    
                      
  url,

                    		
                  

                  

                    83
                    
                    
                      
  blurb = "<-- Interesting description/blurb mentioning the author -->",

                    		
                  

                  

                    84
                    
                    
                      
  dry_run = FALSE,

                    		
                  

                  

                    85
                    
                    
                      
  print = FALSE

                    		
                  

                  

                    86
                    
                    
                      
) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    87
                    5x
                    
                      
  m <- lubridate::month(date)

                    		
                  

                  

                    88
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    89
                    5x
                    
                      
  if (length(date) > 1 && length(blurb) == 1) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    90
                    2x
                    
                      
    blurb <- rep(blurb, length(date))

                    		
                  

                  

                    91
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    92
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    93
                    5x
                    
                      
  if (length(unique(lengths(list(date, title, url, blurb)))) > 1) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    94
                    2x
                    
                      
    cli::cli_abort(

                    		
                  

                  

                    95
                    2x
                    
                      
      "{.arg date}, {.arg title} and {.arg url} all need to be the same length. If {.arg blurb} has more than one item, it must also match the lengths of the others."

                    		
                  

                  

                    96
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    97
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    98
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    99
                    3x
                    
                      
  url <- purrr::map2_chr(url, date, \(u, d) url_from_path(u, d))

                    		
                  

                  

                    100
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    101
                    
                    
                      
  # Get the first Thursday of the relevant month in future

                    		
                  

                  

                    102
                    3x
                    
                      
  time_post <- date |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    103
                    3x
                    
                      
    lubridate::ymd() |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    104
                    3x
                    
                      
    lubridate::floor_date(unit = "month") |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    105
                    3x
                    
                      
    stats::update(

                    		
                  

                  

                    106
                    3x
                    
                      
      year = lubridate::year(Sys.Date()) +

                    		
                  

                  

                    107
                    3x
                    
                      
        as.numeric(m < lubridate::month(Sys.Date()))

                    		
                  

                  

                    108
                    
                    
                      
    ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    109
                    3x
                    
                      
    lubridate::ceiling_date(unit = "week", week_start = "Thursday") |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    110
                    3x
                    
                      
    stats::update(hour = 8, tz = "America/Vancouver") |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    111
                    3x
                    
                      
    unique()

                    		
                  

                  

                    112
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    113
                    3x
                    
                      
  date_pretty <- format(as.Date(date), "%B %e, %Y") |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    114
                    3x
                    
                      
    stringr::str_squish()

                    		
                  

                  

                    115
                    3x
                    
                      
  body <- glue::glue(template("tt_social"), .sep = "\n")

                    		
                  

                  

                    116
                    3x
                    
                      
  if (length(body) > 1) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    117
                    1x
                    
                      
    b1 <- body[1]

                    		
                  

                  

                    118
                    1x
                    
                      
    body <- body[-1] |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    119
                    1x
                    
                      
      stringr::str_extract("\\:hourglass(\\s?.)*")

                    		
                  

                  

                    120
                    1x
                    
                      
    body <- glue::glue_collapse(glue::glue(b1, body, .sep = "\n\n"), sep = "\n")

                    		
                  

                  

                    121
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    122
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    123
                    3x
                    
                      
  where <- c("mastodon", "linkedin")

                    		
                  

                  

                    124
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    125
                    3x
                    
                      
  cmd <- glue::glue(

                    		
                  

                  

                    126
                    
                    
                      
    "

                    		
                  

                  

                    127
                    3x
                    
                      
promoutils::socials_post_issue(

                    		
                  

                  

                    128
                    3x
                    
                      
  time = \"{time_post}\", tz = \"America/Vancouver\",

                    		
                  

                  

                    129
                    3x
                    
                      
  where = \"{where}\", dry_run = {dry_run},

                    		
                  

                  

                    130
                    3x
                    
                      
  over_char_limit = cli::cli_warn,

                    		
                  

                  

                    131
                    3x
                    
                      
  title = \"TT\",

                    		
                  

                  

                    132
                    3x
                    
                      
  body = \"{body}\n\")\n",

                    		
                  

                  

                    133
                    3x
                    
                      
    .trim = FALSE

                    		
                  

                  

                    134
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    135
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    136
                    3x
                    
                      
  copy(cmd, "Throwback Thursday post command", print = print)

                    		
                  

                  

                    137
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                
              

            

            

              

                
                  

                    1
                    
                    
                      
#' Download all Matomo historic views

                    		
                  

                  

                    2
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    3
                    
                    
                      
#' Downloads all views from a specific year range (2010-2024 by defautl).

                    		
                  

                  

                    4
                    
                    
                      
#' Views can be read with [matomo_read()].

                    		
                  

                  

                    5
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    6
                    
                    
                      
#' Requires a Renviron "MATOMO_TOKEN" key representing your token for Matomo

                    		
                  

                  

                    7
                    
                    
                      
#' for the host you'd like to fetch data for.

                    		
                  

                  

                    8
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    9
                    
                    
                      
#' @param year_range Numeric vector. Years to download views for.

                    		
                  

                  

                    10
                    
                    
                      
#' @param host Character. URL for the Matomo host to collect views for. Defaults

                    		
                  

                  

                    11
                    
                    
                      
#' to that of rOpenSci.

                    		
                  

                  

                    12
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    13
                    
                    
                      
#' @returns Nothing. Writes views to disk.

                    		
                  

                  

                    14
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    15
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    16
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    17
                    
                    
                      
matomo_all <- function(

                    		
                  

                  

                    18
                    
                    
                      
  year_range = 2010:2024,

                    		
                  

                  

                    19
                    
                    
                      
  host = "https://ropensci.matomo.cloud"

                    		
                  

                  

                    20
                    
                    
                      
) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    21
                    !
                    
                      
  for (y in year_range) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    22
                    !
                    
                      
    date1 <- paste0(y, "-01-01")

                    		
                  

                  

                    23
                    !
                    
                      
    date2 <- paste0(y, "-12-31")

                    		
                  

                  

                    24
                    !
                    
                      
    views <- matomo_fetch(c(date1, date2), host = host)

                    		
                  

                  

                    25
                    !
                    
                      
    matomo_write(views)

                    		
                  

                  

                    26
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    27
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    28
                    !
                    
                      
  invisible(TRUE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    29
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    30
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    31
                    
                    
                      
#' Update Matomo views

                    		
                  

                  

                    32
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    33
                    
                    
                      
#' Update a specific year of Matomo blog views. Defaults to current year.

                    		
                  

                  

                    34
                    
                    
                      
#' Views can be read with [matomo_read()].

                    		
                  

                  

                    35
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    36
                    
                    
                      
#' Requires a .Renviron "MATOMO_TOKEN" key representing your token for Matomo

                    		
                  

                  

                    37
                    
                    
                      
#' for the host you'd like to fetch data for.

                    		
                  

                  

                    38
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    39
                    
                    
                      
#' @param year Numeric. Year to update

                    		
                  

                  

                    40
                    
                    
                      
#' @param host Character. URL for the Matomo host to collect views for. Defaults

                    		
                  

                  

                    41
                    
                    
                      
#' to that of rOpenSci.

                    		
                  

                  

                    42
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    43
                    
                    
                      
#' @returns Nothing. Updates views to disk.

                    		
                  

                  

                    44
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    45
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    46
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    47
                    
                    
                      
matomo_update <- function(

                    		
                  

                  

                    48
                    
                    
                      
  year = lubridate::year(Sys.Date()),

                    		
                  

                  

                    49
                    
                    
                      
  host = "https://ropensci.matomo.cloud"

                    		
                  

                  

                    50
                    
                    
                      
) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    51
                    1x
                    
                      
  date1 <- lubridate::as_date(paste0(year, "-01-01"))

                    		
                  

                  

                    52
                    1x
                    
                      
  date2 <- min(Sys.Date(), lubridate::as_date(paste0(year, "-12-31")))

                    		
                  

                  

                    53
                    1x
                    
                      
  views <- matomo_fetch(c(date1, date2), host = host)

                    		
                  

                  

                    54
                    1x
                    
                      
  matomo_write(views)

                    		
                  

                  

                    55
                    1x
                    
                      
  invisible(TRUE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    56
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    57
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    58
                    
                    
                      
matomo_fetch <- function(date_range, host = "https://ropensci.matomo.cloud") {

                    		
                  

                  

                    59
                    2x
                    
                      
  rlang::check_installed("matomoR")

                    		
                  

                  

                    60
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    61
                    2x
                    
                      
  if (lubridate::year(date_range[1]) != lubridate::year(date_range[2])) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    62
                    !
                    
                      
    cli::cli_abort("Can only fetch one year at a time")

                    		
                  

                  

                    63
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    64
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    65
                    2x
                    
                      
  Sys.setenv(MATOMO_HOST = host)

                    		
                  

                  

                    66
                    2x
                    
                      
  idSite <- 1

                    		
                  

                  

                    67
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    68
                    2x
                    
                      
  query <- list(

                    		
                  

                  

                    69
                    2x
                    
                      
    module = "API",

                    		
                  

                  

                    70
                    2x
                    
                      
    method = "SegmentEditor.getAll",

                    		
                  

                  

                    71
                    2x
                    
                      
    idSite = idSite

                    		
                  

                  

                    72
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    73
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    74
                    2x
                    
                      
  cli::cli_inform("Fetching segments")

                    		
                  

                  

                    75
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    76
                    2x
                    
                      
  segments <- matomoR::matomo_package_query(query)$content

                    		
                  

                  

                    77
                    2x
                    
                      
  segment <- segments$definition[segments$name == "Main website"]

                    		
                  

                  

                    78
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    79
                    2x
                    
                      
  date <- paste(date_range[1], date_range[2], sep = ",")

                    		
                  

                  

                    80
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    81
                    2x
                    
                      
  query <- list(

                    		
                  

                  

                    82
                    2x
                    
                      
    module = "API",

                    		
                  

                  

                    83
                    2x
                    
                      
    method = "Actions.getPageUrls",

                    		
                  

                  

                    84
                    2x
                    
                      
    period = "day",

                    		
                  

                  

                    85
                    2x
                    
                      
    idSite = idSite,

                    		
                  

                  

                    86
                    2x
                    
                      
    date = date,

                    		
                  

                  

                    87
                    2x
                    
                      
    segment = segment,

                    		
                  

                  

                    88
                    2x
                    
                      
    depth = 10,

                    		
                  

                  

                    89
                    2x
                    
                      
    expanded = 1,

                    		
                  

                  

                    90
                    2x
                    
                      
    flat = 1

                    		
                  

                  

                    91
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    92
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    93
                    2x
                    
                      
  cli::cli_inform("Fetching pages and page views")

                    		
                  

                  

                    94
                    2x
                    
                      
  pageviews_raw <- matomoR::matomo_package_query(query)$content

                    		
                  

                  

                    95
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    96
                    2x
                    
                      
  views <- pageviews_raw[lengths(pageviews_raw) != 0] |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    97
                    2x
                    
                      
    purrr::imap_dfr(

                    		
                  

                  

                    98
                    2x
                    
                      
      ~ dplyr::bind_cols(.x[, c("label", "nb_visits")], date = .y)

                    		
                  

                  

                    99
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    100
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    101
                    2x
                    
                      
  views

                    		
                  

                  

                    102
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    103
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    104
                    
                    
                      
#' Cache folder to store matomo views

                    		
                  

                  

                    105
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    106
                    
                    
                      
#' @returns Character file path

                    		
                  

                  

                    107
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    108
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    109
                    
                    
                      
#' @examples

                    		
                  

                  

                    110
                    
                    
                      
#' matomo_dir()

                    		
                  

                  

                    111
                    
                    
                      
matomo_dir <- function() {

                    		
                  

                  

                    112
                    9x
                    
                      
  tools::R_user_dir("promoutils") |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    113
                    9x
                    
                      
    file.path("views")

                    		
                  

                  

                    114
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    115
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    116
                    
                    
                      
matomo_write <- function(views) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    117
                    1x
                    
                      
  if (!dir.exists(matomo_dir())) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    118
                    !
                    
                      
    cli::cli_inform(

                    		
                  

                  

                    119
                    !
                    
                      
      c("Creating 'views' folder to save Matomo views info: ", matomo_dir())

                    		
                  

                  

                    120
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    121
                    !
                    
                      
    dir.create(matomo_dir(), recursive = TRUE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    122
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    123
                    1x
                    
                      
  if (nrow(views) > 0) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    124
                    1x
                    
                      
    cli::cli_inform(c("Writing new Matomo views to: ", matomo_dir()))

                    		
                  

                  

                    125
                    1x
                    
                      
    y <- lubridate::year(views$date)[1]

                    		
                  

                  

                    126
                    1x
                    
                      
    readr::write_csv(

                    		
                  

                  

                    127
                    1x
                    
                      
      views,

                    		
                  

                  

                    128
                    1x
                    
                      
      file.path(matomo_dir(), paste0("views_", y, ".csv"))

                    		
                  

                  

                    129
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    130
                    
                    
                      
  } else {

                    		
                  

                  

                    131
                    !
                    
                      
    cli::cli_inform("No new views to add")

                    		
                  

                  

                    132
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    133
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    134
                    1x
                    
                      
  invisible()

                    		
                  

                  

                    135
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    136
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    137
                    
                    
                      
#' Read Matomo views saved to disk

                    		
                  

                  

                    138
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    139
                    
                    
                      
#' Reads a saved set of views.

                    		
                  

                  

                    140
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    141
                    
                    
                      
#' @returns Data frame of view data.

                    		
                  

                  

                    142
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    143
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    144
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    145
                    
                    
                      
#' @examplesIf dir.exists(matomo_dir())

                    		
                  

                  

                    146
                    
                    
                      
#' matomo_read()

                    		
                  

                  

                    147
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    148
                    
                    
                      
matomo_read <- function() {

                    		
                  

                  

                    149
                    3x
                    
                      
  views <- list.files(matomo_dir(), pattern = "views", full.names = TRUE) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    150
                    3x
                    
                      
    readr::read_csv(show_col_types = FALSE, progress = FALSE) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    151
                    3x
                    
                      
    dplyr::filter(stringr::str_detect(

                    		
                  

                  

                    152
                    3x
                    
                      
      .data$label,

                    		
                  

                  

                    153
                    3x
                    
                      
      "^(/\\?)|(/aepstk)",

                    		
                  

                  

                    154
                    3x
                    
                      
      negate = TRUE

                    		
                  

                  

                    155
                    
                    
                      
    )) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    156
                    3x
                    
                      
    dplyr::mutate(

                    		
                  

                  

                    157
                    3x
                    
                      
      date = lubridate::as_date(.data$date),

                    		
                  

                  

                    158
                    3x
                    
                      
      year = lubridate::year(.data$date),

                    		
                  

                  

                    159
                    3x
                    
                      
      month = lubridate::month(.data$date),

                    		
                  

                  

                    160
                    3x
                    
                      
      type = dplyr::if_else(

                    		
                  

                  

                    161
                    3x
                    
                      
        .data$label == "/",

                    		
                  

                  

                    162
                    3x
                    
                      
        "home",

                    		
                  

                  

                    163
                    3x
                    
                      
        stringr::str_extract(.data$label, "(?<=^/)[^/]+")

                    		
                  

                  

                    164
                    
                    
                      
      ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    165
                    3x
                    
                      
      pkg = dplyr::if_else(

                    		
                  

                  

                    166
                    3x
                    
                      
        .data$type %in% pkgs_ru()$package,

                    		
                  

                  

                    167
                    3x
                    
                      
        .data$type,

                    		
                  

                  

                    168
                    3x
                    
                      
        NA_character_

                    		
                  

                  

                    169
                    
                    
                      
      ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    170
                    3x
                    
                      
      type = dplyr::case_when(

                    		
                  

                  

                    171
                    3x
                    
                      
        !is.na(.data$pkg) ~ "package_docs",

                    		
                  

                  

                    172
                    3x
                    
                      
        .data$type == "guide-for-authors.html" ~ "blog_guide",

                    		
                  

                  

                    173
                    3x
                    
                      
        .data$type == "reviewerguide.html" ~ "reviewer_guide",

                    		
                  

                  

                    174
                    3x
                    
                      
        .data$type == "authors-guide.html" ~ "authors_guide",

                    		
                  

                  

                    175
                    3x
                    
                      
        TRUE ~ .data$type

                    		
                  

                  

                    176
                    
                    
                      
      ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    177
                    
                    
                      
    ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    178
                    3x
                    
                      
    dplyr::as_tibble() |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    179
                    3x
                    
                      
    dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(.data$nb_visits))

                    		
                  

                  

                    180
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    181
                    3x
                    
                      
  views

                    		
                  

                  

                    182
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    183
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    184
                    
                    
                      
matomo_check_cats <- function() {

                    		
                  

                  

                    185
                    !
                    
                      
  views <- matomo_read() |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    186
                    !
                    
                      
    dplyr::filter(

                    		
                  

                  

                    187
                    !
                    
                      
      views,

                    		
                  

                  

                    188
                    !
                    
                      
      !.data$type %in%

                    		
                  

                  

                    189
                    !
                    
                      
        c(

                    		
                  

                  

                    190
                    !
                    
                      
          "home",

                    		
                  

                  

                    191
                    !
                    
                      
          "blog",

                    		
                  

                  

                    192
                    !
                    
                      
          "commcalls",

                    		
                  

                  

                    193
                    !
                    
                      
          "careers",

                    		
                  

                  

                    194
                    !
                    
                      
          "events",

                    		
                  

                  

                    195
                    !
                    
                      
          "r-universe",

                    		
                  

                  

                    196
                    !
                    
                      
          "help-wanted",

                    		
                  

                  

                    197
                    !
                    
                      
          "packages",

                    		
                  

                  

                    198
                    !
                    
                      
          "news",

                    		
                  

                  

                    199
                    !
                    
                      
          "author",

                    		
                  

                  

                    200
                    !
                    
                      
          "about",

                    		
                  

                  

                    201
                    !
                    
                      
          "software-review",

                    		
                  

                  

                    202
                    !
                    
                      
          "stat-software-review",

                    		
                  

                  

                    203
                    !
                    
                      
          "donate",

                    		
                  

                  

                    204
                    !
                    
                      
          "talks-papers",

                    		
                  

                  

                    205
                    !
                    
                      
          "code-of-conduct",

                    		
                  

                  

                    206
                    !
                    
                      
          "usecases",

                    		
                  

                  

                    207
                    !
                    
                      
          "community",

                    		
                  

                  

                    208
                    !
                    
                      
          "technotes",

                    		
                  

                  

                    209
                    !
                    
                      
          "package_docs",

                    		
                  

                  

                    210
                    !
                    
                      
          "archive",

                    		
                  

                  

                    211
                    !
                    
                      
          "citations",

                    		
                  

                  

                    212
                    !
                    
                      
          "contact",

                    		
                  

                  

                    213
                    !
                    
                      
          "tags",

                    		
                  

                  

                    214
                    !
                    
                      
          "blog_guide",

                    		
                  

                  

                    215
                    !
                    
                      
          "reviewer_guide",

                    		
                  

                  

                    216
                    !
                    
                      
          "how-to-cite-ropensci",

                    		
                  

                  

                    217
                    !
                    
                      
          "related",

                    		
                  

                  

                    218
                    !
                    
                      
          "resources",

                    		
                  

                  

                    219
                    !
                    
                      
          "authors_guide"

                    		
                  

                  

                    220
                    
                    
                      
        )

                    		
                  

                  

                    221
                    
                    
                      
    ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    222
                    !
                    
                      
    dplyr::summarize(.by = c("label", "type", "pkg"))

                    		
                  

                  

                    223
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    224
                    !
                    
                      
  views

                    		
                  

                  

                    225
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    226
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    227
                    
                    
                      
#' Formats and filter Matomo views to blogposts

                    		
                  

                  

                    228
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    229
                    
                    
                      
#' @param views Data frame from [matomo_read()].

                    		
                  

                  

                    230
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    231
                    
                    
                      
#' @returns Data frame of blog post views

                    		
                  

                  

                    232
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    233
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    234
                    
                    
                      
#' @examplesIf dir.exists(matomo_dir())

                    		
                  

                  

                    235
                    
                    
                      
#' matomo_read() |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    236
                    
                    
                      
#'   matomo_blogposts()

                    		
                  

                  

                    237
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    238
                    
                    
                      
matomo_blogposts <- function(views) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    239
                    2x
                    
                      
  blogviews <- views |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    240
                    2x
                    
                      
    dplyr::filter(.data$type %in% c("blog", "technotes")) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    241
                    2x
                    
                      
    dplyr::filter(

                    		
                  

                  

                    242
                    2x
                    
                      
      !stringr::str_detect(.data$label, "/null$"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    243
                    2x
                    
                      
      !stringr::str_detect(.data$label, "/?[^/]+$")

                    		
                  

                  

                    244
                    
                    
                      
    ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    245
                    2x
                    
                      
    dplyr::filter(.data$label != "/blog/") |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    246
                    2x
                    
                      
    dplyr::mutate(

                    		
                  

                  

                    247
                    2x
                    
                      
      post_date = lubridate::ymd(stringr::str_extract(

                    		
                  

                  

                    248
                    2x
                    
                      
        .data$label,

                    		
                  

                  

                    249
                    2x
                    
                      
        "[0-9]{4}/[0-9]{2}/[0-9]{2}"

                    		
                  

                  

                    250
                    
                    
                      
      )),

                    		
                  

                  

                    251
                    2x
                    
                      
      post_month = lubridate::month(.data$post_date)

                    		
                  

                  

                    252
                    
                    
                      
    ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    253
                    2x
                    
                      
    dplyr::summarise(

                    		
                  

                  

                    254
                    2x
                    
                      
      nb_visits = sum(.data$nb_visits),

                    		
                  

                  

                    255
                    2x
                    
                      
      .by = c("label", "post_month", "post_date")

                    		
                  

                  

                    256
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    257
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    258
                    2x
                    
                      
  blogviews

                    		
                  

                  

                    259
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                
              

            

            

              

                
                  

                    1
                    
                    
                      
#' Get a list of recent posts by rOpenSci

                    		
                  

                  

                    2
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    3
                    
                    
                      
#' @param author Character. LinkedIn URN id (e.g., rOpenSci's is "urn:li:organization:77132573")

                    		
                  

                  

                    4
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    5
                    
                    
                      
#' @return list of posts

                    		
                  

                  

                    6
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    7
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    8
                    
                    
                      
#' @references

                    		
                  

                  

                    9
                    
                    
                      
#'   - https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/linkedin/shared/api-guide/concepts/urns

                    		
                  

                  

                    10
                    
                    
                      
#'   - https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/linkedin/marketing/integrations/community-management/shares/posts-api

                    		
                  

                  

                    11
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    12
                    
                    
                      
#' @examples

                    		
                  

                  

                    13
                    
                    
                      
#' li_posts_read(ro_urn)$elements[[1]]$commentary |> cat()

                    		
                  

                  

                    14
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    15
                    
                    
                      
li_posts_read <- function(author) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    16
                    1x
                    
                      
  li_req_posts() |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    17
                    1x
                    
                      
    httr2::req_url_query(author = author, q = "author") |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    18
                    1x
                    
                      
    li_req_perform() |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    19
                    1x
                    
                      
    httr2::resp_body_json()

                    		
                  

                  

                    20
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    21
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    22
                    
                    
                      
#' Post to LinkedIn

                    		
                  

                  

                    23
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    24
                    
                    
                      
#' @param author Character. URN. Either yours (see `li_urn_me()` or rOpenSci's

                    		
                  

                  

                    25
                    
                    
                      
#'   "urn:li:organization:77132573")

                    		
                  

                  

                    26
                    
                    
                      
#' @param body Character. The body of the post as you would like it to appear.

                    		
                  

                  

                    27
                    
                    
                      
#' @param dry_run Logical. TRUE to show what would be sent to the server without

                    		
                  

                  

                    28
                    
                    
                      
#'   actually sending it.

                    		
                  

                  

                    29
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    30
                    
                    
                      
#' @return A string of the URN for the post id.

                    		
                  

                  

                    31
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    32
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    33
                    
                    
                      
#' @examples

                    		
                  

                  

                    34
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    35
                    
                    
                      
#' # Dry-run

                    		
                  

                  

                    36
                    
                    
                      
#' id <- li_posts_write(

                    		
                  

                  

                    37
                    
                    
                      
#'   author = ro_urn, # Post on behalf of rOpenSci

                    		
                  

                  

                    38
                    
                    
                      
#'   body = "Testing out the LinkedIn API via R and httr2!",

                    		
                  

                  

                    39
                    
                    
                      
#'   dry_run = TRUE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    40
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    41
                    
                    
                      
#' \dontrun{

                    		
                  

                  

                    42
                    
                    
                      
#' # Real post

                    		
                  

                  

                    43
                    
                    
                      
#' id <- li_posts_write(

                    		
                  

                  

                    44
                    
                    
                      
#'   author = ro_urn, # Post on behalf of rOpenSci

                    		
                  

                  

                    45
                    
                    
                      
#'   body = "Testing out the LinkedIn API via R and httr2!")

                    		
                  

                  

                    46
