#' }

                    		
                  

                  

                    47
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    48
                    
                    
                      
li_posts_write <- function(author, body, dry_run = FALSE) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    49
                    
                    
                      
  # Need to escape () around links in the body or we lose them and everything following

                    		
                  

                  

                    50
                    1x
                    
                      
  body <- escape_linkedin_chars(body)

                    		
                  

                  

                    51
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    52
                    1x
                    
                      
  r <- li_req_posts() |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    53
                    1x
                    
                      
    httr2::req_headers("Content-Type" = "application/json") |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    54
                    1x
                    
                      
    httr2::req_body_json(

                    		
                  

                  

                    55
                    1x
                    
                      
      list(

                    		
                  

                  

                    56
                    1x
                    
                      
        author = author,

                    		
                  

                  

                    57
                    1x
                    
                      
        commentary = body,

                    		
                  

                  

                    58
                    1x
                    
                      
        visibility = "PUBLIC",

                    		
                  

                  

                    59
                    1x
                    
                      
        distribution = list(

                    		
                  

                  

                    60
                    1x
                    
                      
          "feedDistribution" = "MAIN_FEED",

                    		
                  

                  

                    61
                    1x
                    
                      
          "targetEntities" = list(),

                    		
                  

                  

                    62
                    1x
                    
                      
          "thirdPartyDistributionChannels" = list()

                    		
                  

                  

                    63
                    
                    
                      
        ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    64
                    1x
                    
                      
        lifecycleState = "PUBLISHED",

                    		
                  

                  

                    65
                    1x
                    
                      
        isReshareDisabledByAuthor = FALSE

                    		
                  

                  

                    66
                    
                    
                      
      ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    67
                    1x
                    
                      
      auto_unbox = TRUE

                    		
                  

                  

                    68
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    69
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    70
                    1x
                    
                      
  if (dry_run) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    71
                    1x
                    
                      
    httr2::req_dry_run(r)

                    		
                  

                  

                    72
                    
                    
                      
  } else {

                    		
                  

                  

                    73
                    !
                    
                      
    li_req_perform() |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    74
                    !
                    
                      
      httr2::resp_header("x-restli-id")

                    		
                  

                  

                    75
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    76
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    77
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    78
                    
                    
                      
#' Setup API request for Posts endpoint

                    		
                  

                  

                    79
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    80
                    
                    
                      
#' Can set local linkedin API version with option "promoutils.linkedin_version"

                    		
                  

                  

                    81
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    82
                    
                    
                      
#' @references

                    		
                  

                  

                    83
                    
                    
                      
#'  - https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/linkedin/marketing/integrations/community-management/shares/posts-api

                    		
                  

                  

                    84
                    
                    
                      
#' - Latest API Version: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/linkedin/talent/versioning?#latest-version

                    		
                  

                  

                    85
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    86
                    
                    
                      
#' @noRd

                    		
                  

                  

                    87
                    
                    
                      
li_req_posts <- function() {

                    		
                  

                  

                    88
                    3x
                    
                      
  v <- getOption("promoutils.linkedin_version") %||% "202510"

                    		
                  

                  

                    89
                    3x
                    
                      
  httr2::request(base_url = "https://api.linkedin.com/rest/posts") |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    90
                    3x
                    
                      
    li_req_auth() |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    91
                    3x
                    
                      
    httr2::req_headers(

                    		
                  

                  

                    92
                    3x
                    
                      
      "LinkedIn-Version" = v,

                    		
                  

                  

                    93
                    3x
                    
                      
      "X-Restli-Protocol-Version" = "2.0.0"

                    		
                  

                  

                    94
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    95
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    96
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    97
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    98
                    
                    
                      
#' Fetch your personal URN number

                    		
                  

                  

                    99
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    100
                    
                    
                      
#' This is required to post on LinkedIn to your personal account

                    		
                  

                  

                    101
                    
                    
                      
#' (for rOpenSci, use the organization urn, "urn:li:organization:77132573"

                    		
                  

                  

                    102
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    103
                    
                    
                      
#' @return A string with your URN in the format of "urn:li:person:XXXX"

                    		
                  

                  

                    104
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    105
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    106
                    
                    
                      
#' @examples

                    		
                  

                  

                    107
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    108
                    
                    
                      
#' \dontrun{

                    		
                  

                  

                    109
                    
                    
                      
#' li_urn_me()

                    		
                  

                  

                    110
                    
                    
                      
#' }

                    		
                  

                  

                    111
                    
                    
                      
li_urn_me <- function() {

                    		
                  

                  

                    112
                    1x
                    
                      
  id <- httr2::request(base_url = "https://api.linkedin.com/v2/me") |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    113
                    1x
                    
                      
    li_req_auth() |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    114
                    1x
                    
                      
    httr2::req_url_query(projection = "(id)") |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    115
                    1x
                    
                      
    li_req_perform() |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    116
                    1x
                    
                      
    httr2::resp_body_json() |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    117
                    1x
                    
                      
    unlist()

                    		
                  

                  

                    118
                    1x
                    
                      
  glue::glue("urn:li:person:{id}")

                    		
                  

                  

                    119
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    120
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    121
                    
                    
                      
#' Create authorization for rOpenSci on LinkedIn

                    		
                  

                  

                    122
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    123
                    
                    
                      
#' @param req httr2 request

                    		
                  

                  

                    124
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    125
                    
                    
                      
#' @noRd

                    		
                  

                  

                    126
                    
                    
                      
li_req_auth <- function(req) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    127
                    
                    
                      
  # Uses refresh token so works programatically on GitHub API

                    		
                  

                  

                    128
                    
                    
                      
  # Define authorization

                    		
                  

                  

                    129
                    4x
                    
                      
  httr2::req_oauth_refresh(

                    		
                  

                  

                    130
                    4x
                    
                      
    req,

                    		
                  

                  

                    131
                    4x
                    
                      
    client = li_client()

                    		
                  

                  

                    132
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    133
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    134
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    135
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    136
                    
                    
                      
#' Setup rOpenSci client id for LinkedIn API

                    		
                  

                  

                    137
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    138
                    
                    
                      
#' Expects to find the "Client Secret" in the .Renviron file under

                    		
                  

                  

                    139
                    
                    
                      
#' LINKEDIN_SECRET (Or as a general environemental variable through GitHub

                    		
                  

                  

                    140
                    
                    
                      
#' actions).

                    		
                  

                  

                    141
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    142
                    
                    
                      
#' @noRd

                    		
                  

                  

                    143
                    
                    
                      
li_client <- function() {

                    		
                  

                  

                    144
                    6x
                    
                      
  httr2::oauth_client(

                    		
                  

                  

                    145
                    6x
                    
                      
    name = "rOpenSci_linkedIn",

                    		
                  

                  

                    146
                    6x
                    
                      
    id = "78su90mmb4rsd4",

                    		
                  

                  

                    147
                    6x
                    
                      
    token_url = "https://www.linkedin.com/oauth/v2/accessToken",

                    		
                  

                  

                    148
                    6x
                    
                      
    secret = Sys.getenv("LINKEDIN_SECRET")

                    		
                  

                  

                    149
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    150
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    151
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    152
                    
                    
                      
#' Authorize rOpenSci client with LinkedIn

                    		
                  

                  

                    153
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    154
                    
                    
                      
#' This authorizes the rOpenSci client with **your** credentials (and you must

                    		
                  

                  

                    155
                    
                    
                      
#' be part of the rOpenSci organization as an admin).

                    		
                  

                  

                    156
                    
                    
                      
#' Make sure to take note of the 'refresh_token' as that is what you'll

                    		
                  

                  

                    157
                    
                    
                      
#' add to your .Renviron file for local work, or the GitHub secrets for

                    		
                  

                  

                    158
                    
                    
                      
#' the comms/scheduled_socials workflow.

                    		
                  

                  

                    159
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    160
                    
                    
                      
#' This function authorizes with a redirect url of "http://localhost:1444/",

                    		
                  

                  

                    161
                    
                    
                      
#' this *must* be the same as that listed in the LinkedIn Developer App,

                    		
                  

                  

                    162
                    
                    
                      
#' https://www.linkedin.com/developers/apps.

                    		
                  

                  

                    163
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    164
                    
                    
                      
#' **If you retrieve a new token, you will have to put it in the .Renviron

                    		
                  

                  

                    165
                    
                    
                      
#' and the re-start your R session to continue**

                    		
                  

                  

                    166
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    167
                    
                    
                      
#' This function authorizes with the scopes:

                    		
                  

                  

                    168
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    169
                    
                    
                      
#' - w_member_social (default)

                    		
                  

                  

                    170
                    
                    
                      
#' - w_organization_social (special request)

                    		
                  

                  

                    171
                    
                    
                      
#' - r_organization_social (special request)

                    		
                  

                  

                    172
                    
                    
                      
#' - r_organization_admin (special request)

                    		
                  

                  

                    173
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    174
                    
                    
                      
#' @return httr2 authorization

                    		
                  

                  

                    175
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    176
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    177
                    
                    
                      
#' @references

                    		
                  

                  

                    178
                    
                    
                      
#'   - Refresh tokens API: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/linkedin/shared/authentication/programmatic-refresh-tokens

                    		
                  

                  

                    179
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    180
                    
                    
                      
#' @examples

                    		
                  

                  

                    181
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    182
                    
                    
                      
#' \dontrun{

                    		
                  

                  

                    183
                    
                    
                      
#' # Only run if you need to update the scopes or get a new token (otherwise

                    		
                  

                  

                    184
                    
                    
                      
#' # you'll have to replace all your tokens)

                    		
                  

                  

                    185
                    
                    
                      
#' t <- li_auth()

                    		
                  

                  

                    186
                    
                    
                      
#' t$refresh_token

                    		
                  

                  

                    187
                    
                    
                      
#' }

                    		
                  

                  

                    188
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    189
                    
                    
                      
li_auth <- function() {

                    		
                  

                  

                    190
                    
                    
                      
  auth_url <- "https://www.linkedin.com/oauth/v2/authorization"

                    		
                  

                  

                    191
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    192
                    
                    
                      
  auth_url <- httr2::oauth_flow_auth_code_url(

                    		
                  

                  

                    193
                    
                    
                      
    client = li_client(),

                    		
                  

                  

                    194
                    
                    
                      
    auth_url = auth_url,

                    		
                  

                  

                    195
                    
                    
                      
    state = "DEKELTMVCATS34562THEBEST"

                    		
                  

                  

                    196
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    197
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    198
                    
                    
                      
  httr2::oauth_flow_auth_code(

                    		
                  

                  

                    199
                    
                    
                      
    client = li_client(),

                    		
                  

                  

                    200
                    
                    
                      
    auth_url = auth_url,

                    		
                  

                  

                    201
                    
                    
                      
    redirect_uri = "http://localhost:1444/",

                    		
                  

                  

                    202
                    
                    
                      
    # These scopes allow reading and writing posts (personal and organizational)

                    		
                  

                  

                    203
                    
                    
                      
    scope = glue::glue(

                    		
                  

                  

                    204
                    
                    
                      
      "w_member_social", # write posts on behalf of your id

                    		
                  

                  

                    205
                    
                    
                      
      "w_organization_social", # write posts on behalf of rOpenSci

                    		
                  

                  

                    206
                    
                    
                      
      "r_organization_social", # read posts on behalf of rOpenSci

                    		
                  

                  

                    207
                    
                    
                      
      "r_organization_admin", # read admin on behalf of rOpenSci

                    		
                  

                  

                    208
                    
                    
                      
      "r_basicprofile",

                    		
                  

                  

                    209
                    
                    
                      
      .sep = " "

                    		
                  

                  

                    210
                    
                    
                      
    ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    211
                    
                    
                      
    pkce = FALSE

                    		
                  

                  

                    212
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    213
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    214
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    215
                    
                    
                      
li_req_perform <- function(req) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    216
                    2x
                    
                      
  req |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    217
                    2x
                    
                      
    httr2::req_error(

                    		
                  

                  

                    218
                    2x
                    
                      
      body = \(r) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    219
                    !
                    
                      
        if (httr2::resp_status(r) == 426) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    220
                    !
                    
                      
          "promoutils: Time to update LinkedIn API in `li_req_posts()`"

                    		
                  

                  

                    221
                    
                    
                      
        }

                    		
                  

                  

                    222
                    
                    
                      
      }

                    		
                  

                  

                    223
                    
                    
                      
    ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    224
                    2x
                    
                      
    httr2::req_perform()

                    		
                  

                  

                    225
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                
              

            

            

              

                
                  

                    1
                    
                    
                      
#' Create a draft issue to post to Mastodon and LinkedIn

                    		
                  

                  

                    2
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    3
                    
                    
                      
#' Formats the body and title of an issue and posts it on

                    		
                  

                  

                    4
                    
                    
                      
#' "rosadmin/scheduled_socials". The issue will bed opened in a browser for

                    		
                  

                  

                    5
                    
                    
                      
#' editing and confirmation. Note that issues will not be posted until the

                    		
                  

                  

                    6
                    
                    
                      
#' labels "draft" and "needs-review" have been removed.

                    		
                  

                  

                    7
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    8
                    
                    
                      
#' @param time Date/time. Date and time at which the post should be made

                    		
                  

                  

                    9
                    
                    
                      
#' @param tz Character. Timezone (from `OlsonNames()`) in which to post

                    		
                  

                  

                    10
                    
                    
                      
#' @param title Character. Title of the post (`[Post]` and the date will be

                    		
                  

                  

                    11
                    
                    
                      
#'   prepended and appended

                    		
                  

                  

                    12
                    
                    
                      
#' @param body Character. Text to be posted (omit the YAML for posting info;

                    		
                  

                  

                    13
                    
                    
                      
#'   #RStats and @rstats@a.gup.pe will be appended for Mastodon, #RStats for

                    		
                  

                  

                    14
                    
                    
                      
#'   LinkedIn),

                    		
                  

                  

                    15
                    
                    
                      
#'   *or* link to text file with both Mastodon and LinkedIn body text, headed by

                    		
                  

                  

                    16
                    
                    
                      
#'   by ---- Mastodon ----- and --- LinkedIn -----.

                    		
                  

                  

                    17
                    
                    
                      
#' @param where Character vector. Either `mastodon` and/or `linkedin` to

                    		
                  

                  

                    18
                    
                    
                      
#'   specify which platforms this should be posted on.

                    		
                  

                  

                    19
                    
                    
                      
#' @param add_hash Logical. Whether to automatically add the RStats hashtags.

                    		
                  

                  

                    20
                    
                    
                      
#' @param dry_run Logical. Whether to perform a dry run (do not post, but

                    		
                  

                  

                    21
                    
                    
                      
#'   display draft if `verbose = TRUE`).

                    		
                  

                  

                    22
                    
                    
                      
#' @param avoid_dups Logical. Don't post an issue if any open issue has the

                    		
                  

                  

                    23
                    
                    
                      
#'  same title.

                    		
                  

                  

                    24
                    
                    
                      
#' @param open_browser Logical. Whether to open the issue in the browser.

                    		
                  

                  

                    25
                    
                    
                      
#' @param over_char_limit Function. Error or warn if over the character limit?

                    		
                  

                  

                    26
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    27
                    
                    
                      
#' @inheritParams common_docs

                    		
                  

                  

                    28
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    29
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    30
                    
                    
                      
#' @examples

                    		
                  

                  

                    31
                    
                    
                      
#' socials_post_issue("2025-01-01 00:00:00",

                    		
                  

                  

                    32
                    
                    
                      
#'                    title = "test post",

                    		
                  

                  

                    33
                    
                    
                      
#'                    body = "Test body",

                    		
                  

                  

                    34
                    
                    
                      
#'                    dry_run = TRUE, verbose = TRUE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    35
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    36
                    
                    
                      
socials_post_issue <- function(

                    		
                  

                  

                    37
                    
                    
                      
  time,

                    		
                  

                  

                    38
                    
                    
                      
  tz = "America/Winnipeg",

                    		
                  

                  

                    39
                    
                    
                      
  title,

                    		
                  

                  

                    40
                    
                    
                      
  body,

                    		
                  

                  

                    41
                    
                    
                      
  where = "mastodon",

                    		
                  

                  

                    42
                    
                    
                      
  avoid_dups = TRUE,

                    		
                  

                  

                    43
                    
                    
                      
  add_hash = TRUE,

                    		
                  

                  

                    44
                    
                    
                      
  dry_run = FALSE,

                    		
                  

                  

                    45
                    
                    
                      
  open_browser = TRUE,

                    		
                  

                  

                    46
                    
                    
                      
  over_char_limit = cli::cli_abort,

                    		
                  

                  

                    47
                    
                    
                      
  verbose = FALSE

                    		
                  

                  

                    48
                    
                    
                      
) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    49
                    8x
                    
                      
  if (!all(where %in% c("mastodon", "linkedin"))) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    50
                    !
                    
                      
    cli::cli_abort("'where' must be one of 'mastodon' or 'linkedin'")

                    		
                  

                  

                    51
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    52
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    53
                    8x
                    
                      
  if (!tz %in% OlsonNames()) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    54
                    !
                    
                      
    cli::cli_abort("Couldn't detect timezone")

                    		
                  

                  

                    55
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    56
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    57
                    8x
                    
                      
  date <- lubridate::as_date(time)

                    		
                  

                  

                    58
                    8x
                    
                      
  title <- glue::glue("[Post] - {title} - {date}")

                    		
                  

                  

                    59
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    60
                    8x
                    
                      
  if (file.exists(body)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    61
                    2x
                    
                      
    body <- readr::read_lines(body)

                    		
                  

                  

                    62
                    2x
                    
                      
    n <- stringr::str_which(body, "--- (Mastodon)|(LinkedIn) ---")

                    		
                  

                  

                    63
                    2x
                    
                      
    if (length(n) == 2) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    64
                    1x
                    
                      
      where <- c("mastodon", "linkedin")

                    		
                  

                  

                    65
                    1x
                    
                      
      body <- list(body[(n[1] + 1):(n[2] - 1)], body[(n[2] + 1):(length(body))])

                    		
                  

                  

                    66
                    
                    
                      
    } else if (length(n) == 1) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    67
                    !
                    
                      
      body <- list(body[(n[1] + 1):(length(body))])

                    		
                  

                  

                    68
                    
                    
                      
    } else {

                    		
                  

                  

                    69
                    1x
                    
                      
      n <- 0

                    		
                  

                  

                    70
                    1x
                    
                      
      body <- list(body[(n[1] + 1):(length(body))])

                    		
                  

                  

                    71
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    72
                    2x
                    
                      
    body <- purrr::map(body, \(x) glue::glue_collapse(x, sep = "\n"))

                    		
                  

                  

                    73
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    74
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    75
                    8x
                    
                      
  purrr::walk2(body, where, \(x, y) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    76
                    9x
                    
                      
    socials_post_single(

                    		
                  

                  

                    77
                    9x
                    
                      
      time,

                    		
                  

                  

                    78
                    9x
                    
                      
      tz,

                    		
                  

                  

                    79
                    9x
                    
                      
      title,

                    		
                  

                  

                    80
                    9x
                    
                      
      x,

                    		
                  

                  

                    81
                    9x
                    
                      
      y,

                    		
                  

                  

                    82
                    9x
                    
                      
      avoid_dups,

                    		
                  

                  

                    83
                    9x
                    
                      
      add_hash,

                    		
                  

                  

                    84
                    9x
                    
                      
      dry_run,

                    		
                  

                  

                    85
                    9x
                    
                      
      open_browser,

                    		
                  

                  

                    86
                    9x
                    
                      
      over_char_limit,

                    		
                  

                  

                    87
                    9x
                    
                      
      verbose

                    		
                  

                  

                    88
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    89
                    
                    
                      
  })

                    		
                  

                  

                    90
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    91
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    92
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    93
                    
                    
                      
socials_post_single <- function(

                    		
                  

                  

                    94
                    
                    
                      
  time,

                    		
                  

                  

                    95
                    
                    
                      
  tz,

                    		
                  

                  

                    96
                    
                    
                      
  title,

                    		
                  

                  

                    97
                    
                    
                      
  body,

                    		
                  

                  

                    98
                    
                    
                      
  where,

                    		
                  

                  

                    99
                    
                    
                      
  avoid_dups,

                    		
                  

                  

                    100
                    
                    
                      
  add_hash,

                    		
                  

                  

                    101
                    
                    
                      
  dry_run,

                    		
                  

                  

                    102
                    
                    
                      
  open_browser,

                    		
                  

                  

                    103
                    
                    
                      
  over_char_limit = cli::cli_abort,

                    		
                  

                  

                    104
                    
                    
                      
  verbose,

                    		
                  

                  

                    105
                    
                    
                      
  call = rlang::caller_env()

                    		
                  

                  

                    106
                    
                    
                      
) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    107
                    9x
                    
                      
  labels <- c(where, "draft", "needs-review")

                    		
                  

                  

                    108
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    109
                    9x
                    
                      
  if (add_hash) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    110
                    8x
                    
                      
    hash <- c(

                    		
                  

                  

                    111
                    8x
                    
                      
      "mastodon" = "\n#RStats\n@rstats@a.gup.pe",

                    		
                  

                  

                    112
                    8x
                    
                      
      "linkedin" = "\n#RStats"

                    		
                  

                  

                    113
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    114
                    8x
                    
                      
    hash <- hash[where]

                    		
                  

                  

                    115
                    8x
                    
                      
    body <- glue::glue("{body}\n{hash}")

                    		
                  

                  

                    116
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    117
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    118
                    9x
                    
                      
  if (where == "mastodon" && (n <- calc_chars(body)) >= 490) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    119
                    1x
                    
                      
    over_char_limit(

                    		
                  

                  

                    120
                    1x
                    
                      
      "Very close or over the character limit of 500\n",

                    		
                  

                  

                    121
                    1x
                    
                      
      "(this message has {n} including hashtags)",

                    		
                  

                  

                    122
                    1x
                    
                      
      call = call

                    		
                  

                  

                    123
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    124
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    125
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    126
                    8x
                    
                      
  body <- glue::glue(

                    		
                  

                  

                    127
                    
                    
                      
    "~~~",

                    		
                  

                  

                    128
                    8x
                    
                      
    "time: {time}",

                    		
                  

                  

                    129
                    8x
                    
                      
    "tz: {tz}",

                    		
                  

                  

                    130
                    
                    
                      
    "~~~",

                    		
                  

                  

                    131
                    
                    
                      
    "",

                    		
                  

                  

                    132
                    8x
                    
                      
    "{body}",

                    		
                  

                  

                    133
                    8x
                    
                      
    .sep = "\n",

                    		
                  

                  

                    134
                    8x
                    
                      
    trim = FALSE

                    		
                  

                  

                    135
                    
                    
                      
  ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    136
                    8x
                    
                      
    stringr::str_replace("\n\n", "\n")

                    		
                  

                  

                    137
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    138
                    8x
                    
                      
  gh_issue_post(

                    		
                  

                  

                    139
                    8x
                    
                      
    title,

                    		
                  

                  

                    140
                    8x
                    
                      
    body,

                    		
                  

                  

                    141
                    8x
                    
                      
    labels = labels,

                    		
                  

                  

                    142
                    8x
                    
                      
    owner = "rosadmin",

                    		
                  

                  

                    143
                    8x
                    
                      
    repo = "scheduled_socials",

                    		
                  

                  

                    144
                    8x
                    
                      
    avoid_dups = avoid_dups,

                    		
                  

                  

                    145
                    8x
                    
                      
    dry_run = dry_run,

                    		
                  

                  

                    146
                    8x
                    
                      
    open_browser = open_browser

                    		
                  

                  

                    147
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    148
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    149
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    150
                    
                    
                      
calc_chars <- function(x) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    151
                    6x
                    
                      
  stringr::str_remove_all(x, "(?<=\\w)@(\\w|\\.)+") |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    152
                    6x
                    
                      
    stringr::str_replace_all(

                    		
                  

                  

                    153
                    6x
                    
                      
      "http(s?)\\:[^ ]+",

                    		
                  

                  

                    154
                    6x
                    
                      
      paste0(rep("Z", 23), collapse = "")

                    		
                  

                  

                    155
                    
                    
                      
    ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    156
                    6x
                    
                      
    nchar() |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    157
                    6x
                    
                      
    sum()

                    		
                  

                  

                    158
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                
              

            

            

              

                
                  

                    1
                    
                    
                      
#' Fetch help wanted issues

                    		
                  

                  

                    2
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    3
                    
                    
                      
#' @param min_date Character/Date. Earliest date a help-wanted label was added to an issue to be included.

                    		
                  

                  

                    4
                    
                    
                      
#' @param json Character. Location of the issues.json file to use.

                    		
                  

                  

                    5
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    6
                    
                    
                      
#' @returns Data frame of help wanted issues

                    		
                  

                  

                    7
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    8
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    9
                    
                    
                      
#' @examples

                    		
                  

                  

                    10
                    
                    
                      
#' h <- help_fetch("2025-01-01")

                    		
                  

                  

                    11
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    12
                    
                    
                      
help_fetch <- function(

                    		
                  

                  

                    13
                    
                    
                      
  min_date,

                    		
                  

                  

                    14
                    
                    
                      
  json = "/repos/rosadmin/help-wanted/contents/issues.json"

                    		
                  

                  

                    15
                    
                    
                      
) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    16
                    1x
                    
                      
  min_date <- lubridate::ymd(min_date)

                    		
                  

                  

                    17
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    18
                    1x
                    
                      
  help <- tryCatch(

                    		
                  

                  

                    19
                    
                    
                      
    {

                    		
                  

                  

                    20
                    1x
                    
                      
      httr2::request("https://api.github.com") |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    21
                    1x
                    
                      
        httr2::req_url_path_append(json) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    22
                    1x
                    
                      
        httr2::req_auth_bearer_token(gh::gh_token()) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    23
                    1x
                    
                      
        httr2::req_perform() |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    24
                    1x
                    
                      
        httr2::resp_body_json() |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    25
                    1x
                    
                      
        purrr::pluck("download_url") |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    26
                    1x
                    
                      
        jsonlite::fromJSON()

                    		
                  

                  

                    27
                    
                    
                      
    },

                    		
                  

                  

                    28
                    1x
                    
                      
    error = \(e) data.frame()

                    		
                  

                  

                    29
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    30
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    31
                    1x
                    
                      
  pkgs <- pkgs_ru() |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    32
                    1x
                    
                      
    dplyr::select(

                    		
                  

                  

                    33
                    1x
                    
                      
      "package",

                    		
                  

                  

                    34
                    1x
                    
                      
      "maintainer_name",

                    		
                  

                  

                    35
                    1x
                    
                      
      "maintainer_github",

                    		
                  

                  

                    36
                    1x
                    
                      
      "maintainer_mastodon"

                    		
                  

                  

                    37
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    38
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    39
                    1x
                    
                      
  help |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    40
                    1x
                    
                      
    dplyr::filter(

                    		
                  

                  

                    41
                    1x
                    
                      
      .data$label_created >= .env$min_date,

                    		
                  

                  

                    42
                    1x
                    
                      
      .data$label_created < Sys.Date()

                    		
                  

                  

                    43
                    
                    
                      
    ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    44
                    1x
                    
                      
    dplyr::rename(

                    		
                  

                  

                    45
                    1x
                    
                      
      "labeller_name" = "author",

                    		
                  

                  

                    46
                    1x
                    
                      
      "labeller_github" = "username",

                    		
                  

                  

                    47
                    1x
                    
                      
      "maintainer_name" = "pkg_author"

                    		
                  

                  

                    48
                    
                    
                      
    ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    49
                    1x
                    
                      
    dplyr::left_join(pkgs, by = c("package", "maintainer_name"))

                    		
                  

                  

                    50
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    51
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    52
                    
                    
                      
#' Get social media handles for helpwanted issues

                    		
                  

                  

                    53
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    54
                    
                    
                      
#' @param help Data frame of help wanted issues.

                    		
                  

                  

                    55
                    
                    
                      
#' @inheritParams common_docs

                    		
                  

                  

                    56
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    57
                    
                    
                      
#' @returns Data frame of help wanted issues with social median handles added

                    		
                  

                  

                    58
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    59
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    60
                    
                    
                      
#' @examplesIf interactive()

                    		
                  

                  

                    61
                    
                    
                      
#' h <- help_fetch("2025-01-01") |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    62
                    
                    
                      
#'   help_handles()

                    		
                  

                  

                    63
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    64
                    
                    
                      
help_handles <- function(help, force_masto = FALSE) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    65
                    2x
                    
                      
  if (nrow(help) == 0) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    66
                    !
                    
                      
    cli::cli_inform("No Help Wanted")

                    		
                  

                  

                    67
                    !
                    
                      
    return(data.frame())

                    		
                  

                  

                    68
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    69
                    2x
                    
                      
  pkgs <- pkgs_ru()

                    		
                  

                  

                    70
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    71
                    2x
                    
                      
  help <- help |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    72
                    2x
                    
                      
    dplyr::left_join(

                    		
                  

                  

                    73
                    2x
                    
                      
      dplyr::select(pkgs, "package", "owner"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    74
                    2x
                    
                      
      by = "package"

                    		
                  

                  

                    75
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    76
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    77
                    
                    
                      
  # Get missing Github by Name and other handles for maintainers

                    		
                  

                  

                    78
                    2x
                    
                      
  if (anyNA(help$maintainer_github)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    79
                    !
                    
                      
    help <- monarch::add_handles(

                    		
                  

                  

                    80
                    !
                    
                      
      help,

                    		
                  

                  

                    81
                    !
                    
                      
      primary = "name",

                    		
                  

                  

                    82
                    !
                    
                      
      prefix = "maintainer_",

                    		
                  

                  

                    83
                    !
                    
                      
      pkg_col = "package",

                    		
                  

                  

                    84
                    !
                    
                      
      owner_col = "owner",

                    		
                  

                  

                    85
                    !
                    
                      
      force_masto = force_masto

                    		
                  

                  

                    86
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    87
                    
                    
                      
  } else {

                    		
                  

                  

                    88
                    2x
                    
                      
    help <- monarch::add_handles(

                    		
                  

                  

                    89
                    2x
                    
                      
      help,

                    		
                  

                  

                    90
                    2x
                    
                      
      primary = "github",

                    		
                  

                  

                    91
                    2x
                    
                      
      prefix = "maintainer_",

                    		
                  

                  

                    92
                    2x
                    
                      
      force_masto = force_masto

                    		
                  

                  

                    93
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    94
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    95
                    
                    
                      
  # Get handles by Github for Issue authors

                    		
                  

                  

                    96
                    2x
                    
                      
  help <- monarch::add_handles(

                    		
                  

                  

                    97
                    2x
                    
                      
    help,

                    		
                  

                  

                    98
                    2x
                    
                      
    prefix = "labeller_",

                    		
                  

                  

                    99
                    2x
                    
                      
    force_masto = force_masto

                    		
                  

                  

                    100
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    101
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    102
                    2x
                    
                      
  help

                    		
                  

                  

                    103
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    104
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    105
                    
                    
                      
#' Create help-wanted `socials_post_issue()` command

                    		
                  

                  

                    106
                    
                    
                      
#'
