                    107
                    
                    
                      
#' @param help Data frame. Formatted help-wanted issues including social media

                    		
                  

                  

                    108
                    
                    
                      
#'   handles and arranged by platform upon which to post, output of

                    		
                  

                  

                    109
                    
                    
                      
#'   `by_platform()`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    110
                    
                    
                      
#' @param date_time Character/Date. When to post. Defaults to next Thursday if `NULL`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    111
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    112
                    
                    
                      
#' @inheritParams common_docs

                    		
                  

                  

                    113
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    114
                    
                    
                      
#' @returns Copies commands to clipboard, optionally prints if (`print = TRUE`).

                    		
                  

                  

                    115
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    116
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    117
                    
                    
                      
#' @examplesIf interactive()

                    		
                  

                  

                    118
                    
                    
                      
#' h <- help_fetch("2025-05-23") |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    119
                    
                    
                      
#'   help_handles() |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    120
                    
                    
                      
#'   by_platform()

                    		
                  

                  

                    121
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    122
                    
                    
                      
#' help_post(h, print = TRUE)  # For non-interactive examples

                    		
                  

                  

                    123
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    124
                    
                    
                      
help_post <- function(help, date_time = NULL, dry_run = FALSE, print = FALSE) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    125
                    
                    
                      
  #TODO: Use dictionary?

                    		
                  

                  

                    126
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    127
                    2x
                    
                      
  if (nrow(help) == 0) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    128
                    !
                    
                      
    message("No new help-wanted issues to post")

                    		
                  

                  

                    129
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    130
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    131
                    2x
                    
                      
  ei <- emo::ji("idea") # So picked up by namespacing checks

                    		
                  

                  

                    132
                    2x
                    
                      
  h <- help |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    133
                    2x
                    
                      
    dplyr::mutate(

                    		
                  

                  

                    134
                    2x
                    
                      
      labels_first = dplyr::if_else(

                    		
                  

                  

                    135
                    2x
                    
                      
        .data$labels_first,

                    		
                  

                  

                    136
                    2x
                    
                      
        glue::glue(

                    		
                  

                  

                    137
                    2x
                    
                      
          "{ei} A great way to learn with this 'good first issue'! {ei}\n\n\n"

                    		
                  

                  

                    138
                    
                    
                      
        ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    139
                    2x
                    
                      
        glue::glue("")

                    		
                  

                  

                    140
                    
                    
                      
      )

                    		
                  

                  

                    141
                    
                    
                      
    ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    142
                    2x
                    
                      
    dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(.data$label_created)) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    143
                    2x
                    
                      
    dplyr::mutate(

                    		
                  

                  

                    144
                    2x
                    
                      
      type = dplyr::if_else(

                    		
                  

                  

                    145
                    2x
                    
                      
        stringr::str_detect(.data$title, "New Maintainer Wanted"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    146
                    2x
                    
                      
        "maintainer",

                    		
                  

                  

                    147
                    2x
                    
                      
        "regular"

                    		
                  

                  

                    148
                    
                    
                      
      ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    149
                    2x
                    
                      
      not_maint = is.na(.data$maintainer_github) |

                    		
                  

                  

                    150
                    2x
                    
                      
        any(.data$maintainer_github != .data$labeller_github)

                    		
                  

                  

                    151
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    152
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    153
                    2x
                    
                      
  if (any(h$type == "maintainer")) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    154
                    !
                    
                      
    drafts_maintainer <- h |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    155
                    !
                    
                      
      dplyr::filter(.data$type == "maintainer") |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    156
                    !
                    
                      
      dplyr::select("package", "url", "platform") |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    157
                    !
                    
                      
      dplyr::distinct() |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    158
                    !
                    
                      
      dplyr::mutate(

                    		
                  

                  

                    159
                    !
                    
                      
        how_many = dplyr::if_else(

                    		
                  

                  

                    160
                    !
                    
                      
          dplyr::n_distinct(.data$package) == 1,

                    		
                  

                  

                    161
                    !
                    
                      
          "An rOpenSci package is",

                    		
                  

                  

                    162
                    !
                    
                      
          "rOpenSci packages are"

                    		
                  

                  

                    163
                    
                    
                      
        ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    164
                    !
                    
                      
        opening = glue::glue(

                    		
                  

                  

                    165
                    !
                    
                      
          "[help wanted] {how_many} looking for maintainer help {emo::ji('folded hands')}\n\n",

                    		
                  

                  

                    166
                    !
                    
                      
          "The following packages are looking for a new maintainer (or maintainer team).\n",

                    		
                  

                  

                    167
                    !
                    
                      
          "Check out their issues to see about getting involved\n\n"

                    		
                  

                  

                    168
                    
                    
                      
        ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    169
                    !
                    
                      
        body = glue::glue("{package} - {url}")

                    		
                  

                  

                    170
                    
                    
                      
      ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    171
                    !
                    
                      
      dplyr::summarize(

                    		
                  

                  

                    172
                    !
                    
                      
        draft = paste0(

                    		
                  

                  

                    173
                    !
                    
                      
          .data$opening[1],

                    		
                  

                  

                    174
                    !
                    
                      
          "\n",

                    		
                  

                  

                    175
                    !
                    
                      
          glue::glue_collapse(.data$body, sep = "\n")

                    		
                  

                  

                    176
                    
                    
                      
        ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    177
                    !
                    
                      
        .by = "platform"

                    		
                  

                  

                    178
                    
                    
                      
      ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    179
                    !
                    
                      
      dplyr::arrange(.data$platform)

                    		
                  

                  

                    180
                    
                    
                      
  } else {

                    		
                  

                  

                    181
                    2x
                    
                      
    drafts_maintainer <- data.frame()

                    		
                  

                  

                    182
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    183
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    184
                    2x
                    
                      
  if (any(h$type == "regular")) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    185
                    2x
                    
                      
    n_pkgs <- dplyr::n_distinct(h$package[h$type == "regular"])

                    		
                  

                  

                    186
                    2x
                    
                      
    how_many <- dplyr::if_else(

                    		
                  

                  

                    187
                    2x
                    
                      
      n_pkgs == 1,

                    		
                  

                  

                    188
                    2x
                    
                      
      "An rOpenSci package is",

                    		
                  

                  

                    189
                    2x
                    
                      
      "rOpenSci packages are"

                    		
                  

                  

                    190
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    191
                    2x
                    
                      
    opening <- glue::glue(

                    		
                  

                  

                    192
                    2x
                    
                      
      "[help wanted] {how_many} looking for some help! {emo::ji('folded hands')}\n\n"

                    		
                  

                  

                    193
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    194
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    195
                    2x
                    
                      
    drafts_regular <- h |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    196
                    2x
                    
                      
      dplyr::filter(.data$type == "regular") |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    197
                    2x
                    
                      
      dplyr::mutate(

                    		
                  

                  

                    198
                    2x
                    
                      
        pkg = glue::glue("{emo::ji('package')} {package}"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    199
                    2x
                    
                      
        body = glue::glue(

                    		
                  

                  

                    200
                    2x
                    
                      
          "'{title}' at {url} (by {labeller}) {labels_first}"

                    		
                  

                  

                    201
                    
                    
                      
        ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    202
                    2x
                    
                      
        space = dplyr::if_else(.env$n_pkgs == 1, "\n", ""),

                    		
                  

                  

                    203
                    2x
                    
                      
        pkg = dplyr::if_else(

                    		
                  

                  

                    204
                    2x
                    
                      
          .data$not_maint,

                    		
                  

                  

                    205
                    2x
                    
                      
          glue::glue("{pkg} (maintained by {maintainer})"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    206
                    2x
                    
                      
          .data$pkg

                    		
                  

                  

                    207
                    
                    
                      
        )

                    		
                  

                  

                    208
                    
                    
                      
      ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    209
                    2x
                    
                      
      dplyr::summarize(

                    		
                  

                  

                    210
                    2x
                    
                      
        n = dplyr::n(),

                    		
                  

                  

                    211
                    2x
                    
                      
        body = glue::glue_collapse(.data$body, sep = "\n"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    212
                    2x
                    
                      
        subopening = dplyr::if_else(

                    		
                  

                  

                    213
                    2x
                    
                      
          .data$n == 1,

                    		
                  

                  

                    214
                    2x
                    
                      
          "Check out this 'help wanted' issue:\n",

                    		
                  

                  

                    215
                    2x
                    
                      
          "Check out 'help wanted' issues:\n"

                    		
                  

                  

                    216
                    
                    
                      
        ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    217
                    2x
                    
                      
        body = glue::glue(

                    		
                  

                  

                    218
                    2x
                    
                      
          "{pkg[1]}\n{space[1]}{subopening[1]}{body}{space[1]}"

                    		
                  

                  

                    219
                    
                    
                      
        ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    220
                    2x
                    
                      
        .by = c("platform", "package")

                    		
                  

                  

                    221
                    
                    
                      
      )

                    		
                  

                  

                    222
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    223
                    2x
                    
                      
    drafts_regular <- drafts_regular |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    224
                    2x
                    
                      
      dplyr::mutate(

                    		
                  

                  

                    225
                    2x
                    
                      
        nchar = nchar(.data$body),

                    		
                  

                  

                    226
                    2x
                    
                      
        cum_char = cumsum(.data$nchar),

                    		
                  

                  

                    227
                    2x
                    
                      
        n_post = (.data$cum_char + nchar(.env$opening)) / 500,

                    		
                  

                  

                    228
                    2x
                    
                      
        n_post = ceiling(.data$n_post),

                    		
                  

                  

                    229
                    2x
                    
                      
        n_post = dplyr::if_else(.data$platform == "linkedin", 1, .data$n_post),

                    		
                  

                  

                    230
                    2x
                    
                      
        .by = "platform"

                    		
                  

                  

                    231
                    
                    
                      
      ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    232
                    2x
                    
                      
      dplyr::summarize(

                    		
                  

                  

                    233
                    2x
                    
                      
        body = glue::glue_collapse(.data$body, sep = "\n\n"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    234
                    2x
                    
                      
        draft = glue::glue("{opening}\n{body}"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    235
                    2x
                    
                      
        .by = c("platform", "n_post")

                    		
                  

                  

                    236
                    
                    
                      
      ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    237
                    2x
                    
                      
      dplyr::arrange(.data$platform, .data$n_post)

                    		
                  

                  

                    238
                    
                    
                      
  } else {

                    		
                  

                  

                    239
                    !
                    
                      
    drafts_regular <- data.frame()

                    		
                  

                  

                    240
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    241
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    242
                    
                    
                      
  # Next Thursday

                    		
                  

                  

                    243
                    2x
                    
                      
  date_time <- date_time %||% post_time("Thursday", 8)

                    		
                  

                  

                    244
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    245
                    2x
                    
                      
  cmd <- glue::glue(

                    		
                  

                  

                    246
                    2x
                    
                      
    "# {Sys.Date()} ------------------------------------------\n",

                    		
                  

                  

                    247
                    2x
                    
                      
    .trim = FALSE

                    		
                  

                  

                    248
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    249
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    250
                    2x
                    
                      
  if (nrow(drafts_maintainer) > 0) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    251
                    !
                    
                      
    cmd <- c(

                    		
                  

                  

                    252
                    !
                    
                      
      cmd,

                    		
                  

                  

                    253
                    !
                    
                      
      glue::glue(

                    		
                  

                  

                    254
                    !
                    
                      
        "## Maintainers - {drafts_maintainer$platform}\npromoutils::socials_post_issue(

                    		
                  

                  

                    255
                    !
                    
                      
    time = \"{date_time}\", tz = \"America/Vancouver\",

                    		
                  

                  

                    256
                    !
                    
                      
    where = \"{drafts_maintainer$platform}\", dry_run = {dry_run},

                    		
                  

                  

                    257
                    !
                    
                      
    over_char_limit = cli::cli_warn,

                    		
                  

                  

                    258
                    !
                    
                      
    title = \"help-wanted - maintainer\",

                    		
                  

                  

                    259
                    !
                    
                      
    body = \"{drafts_maintainer$draft}\n\")\n\n",

                    		
                  

                  

                    260
                    !
                    
                      
        .trim = FALSE

                    		
                  

                  

                    261
                    
                    
                      
      )

                    		
                  

                  

                    262
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    263
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    264
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    265
                    2x
                    
                      
  if (nrow(drafts_regular) > 0) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    266
                    2x
                    
                      
    cmd <- c(

                    		
                  

                  

                    267
                    2x
                    
                      
      cmd,

                    		
                  

                  

                    268
                    2x
                    
                      
      glue::glue(

                    		
                  

                  

                    269
                    2x
                    
                      
        "## Regular - {drafts_regular$platform}\npromoutils::socials_post_issue(

                    		
                  

                  

                    270
                    2x
                    
                      
    time = \"{date_time}\", tz = \"America/Vancouver\",

                    		
                  

                  

                    271
                    2x
                    
                      
    where = \"{drafts_regular$platform}\", dry_run = {dry_run},

                    		
                  

                  

                    272
                    2x
                    
                      
    over_char_limit = cli::cli_warn,

                    		
                  

                  

                    273
                    2x
                    
                      
    title = \"help-wanted\",

                    		
                  

                  

                    274
                    2x
                    
                      
    body = \"{drafts_regular$draft}\n\")\n",

                    		
                  

                  

                    275
                    2x
                    
                      
        .trim = FALSE

                    		
                  

                  

                    276
                    
                    
                      
      )

                    		
                  

                  

                    277
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    278
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    279
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    280
                    2x
                    
                      
  cmd <- glue::glue_collapse(cmd, "\n")

                    		
                  

                  

                    281
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    282
                    2x
                    
                      
  copy(cmd, "Help-wanted post commands", print = print)

                    		
                  

                  

                    283
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                
              

            

            

              

                
                  

                    1
                    
                    
                      
#' Create a cached version of the GH api calls

                    		
                  

                  

                    2
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    3
                    
                    
                      
#' @inheritParams gh::gh

                    		
                  

                  

                    4
                    
                    
                      
#' @inheritDotParams gh::gh

                    		
                  

                  

                    5
                    
                    
                      
#' @details `memoise::memoise(gh::gh)`

                    		
                  

                  

                    6
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    7
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    8
                    
                    
                      
gh_cache <- memoise::memoise(gh::gh, omit_args = c(".max_rate"))

                    		
                  

                  

                    9
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    10
                    
                    
                      
#' List of packages and details from R-Universe API

                    		
                  

                  

                    11
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    12
                    
                    
                      
#' @param universe Character. Universe to collect details from.

                    		
                  

                  

                    13
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    14
                    
                    
                      
#' @returns Data frame of package details

                    		
                  

                  

                    15
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    16
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    17
                    
                    
                      
#' @examples

                    		
                  

                  

                    18
                    
                    
                      
#' pkgs_ru()

                    		
                  

                  

                    19
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    20
                    
                    
                      
pkgs_ru <- function(universe = "ropensci") {

                    		
                  

                  

                    21
                    7x
                    
                      
  pkgs <- httr2::request("https://ropensci.r-universe.dev/api/packages") |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    22
                    7x
                    
                      
    httr2::req_user_agent("promoutils") |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    23
                    7x
                    
                      
    httr2::req_perform() |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    24
                    7x
                    
                      
    httr2::resp_body_json()

                    		
                  

                  

                    25
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    26
                    7x
                    
                      
  pkgs |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    27
                    7x
                    
                      
    purrr::map(\(x) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    28
                    2506x
                    
                      
      if (!is.null(x[["_contributors"]])) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    29
                    2506x
                    
                      
        cc <- purrr::map(x[["_contributors"]], data.frame) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    30
                    2506x
                    
                      
          purrr::list_rbind() |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    31
                    2506x
                    
                      
          dplyr::select(-dplyr::any_of("uuid")) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    32
                    2506x
                    
                      
          dplyr::rename_with(\(n) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    33
                    2506x
                    
                      
            stringr::str_replace(n, "^user$", "github")

                    		
                  

                  

                    34
                    
                    
                      
          }) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    35
                    2506x
                    
                      
          dplyr::rename_with(\(n) paste0("contributor_", n))

                    		
                  

                  

                    36
                    
                    
                      
      } else {

                    		
                  

                  

                    37
                    !
                    
                      
        cc <- NULL

                    		
                  

                  

                    38
                    
                    
                      
      }

                    		
                  

                  

                    39
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    40
                    2506x
                    
                      
      m <- x[["_maintainer"]]

                    		
                  

                  

                    41
                    2506x
                    
                      
      m <- rlang::set_names(m, paste0("maintainer_", names(m)))

                    		
                  

                  

                    42
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    43
                    2506x
                    
                      
      cols <- c("Package", "Title", "_owner", "_devurl", "_pkgdown")

                    		
                  

                  

                    44
                    2506x
                    
                      
      xx <- append(x[names(x) %in% cols], m)

                    		
                  

                  

                    45
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    46
                    2506x
                    
                      
      for (n in c(cols, "maintainer_login")) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    47
                    15036x
                    
                      
        if (!n %in% names(xx)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    48
                    280x
                    
                      
          xx[[n]] <- NA

                    		
                  

                  

                    49
                    
                    
                      
        }

                    		
                  

                  

                    50
                    
                    
                      
      }

                    		
                  

                  

                    51
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    52
                    2506x
                    
                      
      xx |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    53
                    2506x
                    
                      
        dplyr::as_tibble() |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    54
                    2506x
                    
                      
        dplyr::mutate(contributors = list(cc)) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    55
                    2506x
                    
                      
        dplyr::rename_with(tolower) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    56
                    2506x
                    
                      
        dplyr::rename(

                    		
                  

                  

                    57
                    2506x
                    
                      
          "maintainer_github" = "maintainer_login",

                    		
                  

                  

                    58
                    2506x
                    
                      
          "owner" = "_owner",

                    		
                  

                  

                    59
                    2506x
                    
                      
          "url" = "_devurl",

                    		
                  

                  

                    60
                    2506x
                    
                      
          "docs" = "_pkgdown"

                    		
                  

                  

                    61
                    
                    
                      
        )

                    		
                  

                  

                    62
                    
                    
                      
    }) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    63
                    7x
                    
                      
    purrr::list_rbind()

                    		
                  

                  

                    64
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    65
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    66
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    67
                    
                    
                      
#' Get package author names

                    		
                  

                  

                    68
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    69
                    
                    
                      
#' @param package Character. Package name

                    		
                  

                  

                    70
                    
                    
                      
#' @param pkgs Data frame. Packages returned by [pkgs_ru()].

                    		
                  

                  

                    71
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    72
                    
                    
                      
#' @return Character name of maintainer

                    		
                  

                  

                    73
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    74
                    
                    
                      
#' @examples

                    		
                  

                  

                    75
                    
                    
                      
#' pkg_authors("weathercan", pkgs_ru())

                    		
                  

                  

                    76
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    77
                    
                    
                      
pkg_authors <- function(package, pkgs) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    78
                    
                    
                      
  # TODO: Direct call to R Universe API?

                    		
                  

                  

                    79
                    1x
                    
                      
  a <- dplyr::filter(pkgs, .data$package %in% .env$package) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    80
                    1x
                    
                      
    dplyr::pull(.data$maintainer_name)

                    		
                  

                  

                    81
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    82
                    1x
                    
                      
  if (length(a) == 0) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    83
                    !
                    
                      
    a <- NA_character_

                    		
                  

                  

                    84
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    85
                    1x
                    
                      
  a

                    		
                  

                  

                    86
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    87
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    88
                    
                    
                      
nth_day <- function(x) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    89
                    1x
                    
                      
  th <- dplyr::case_when(

                    		
                  

                  

                    90
                    1x
                    
                      
    x %in% c(1, 21, 31) ~ "st",

                    		
                  

                  

                    91
                    1x
                    
                      
    x %in% c(2, 22) ~ "nd",

                    		
                  

                  

                    92
                    1x
                    
                      
    x %in% c(3, 23) ~ "rd",

                    		
                  

                  

                    93
                    1x
                    
                      
    TRUE ~ "th"

                    		
                  

                  

                    94
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    95
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    96
                    1x
                    
                      
  paste0(x, th)

                    		
                  

                  

                    97
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    98
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    99
                    
                    
                      
#' Find the next date

                    		
                  

                  

                    100
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    101
                    
                    
                      
#' Given a date and a day of the week,

                    		
                  

                  

                    102
                    
                    
                      
#' Given a date return the next month's first Tuesday

                    		
                  

                  

                    103
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    104
                    
                    
                      
#' @param month Character/Date. The current month. Date returned is the next month.

                    		
                  

                  

                    105
                    
                    
                      
#' @param which Character/Numeric. Which week day to return. Either number or

                    		
                  

                  

                    106
                    
                    
                      
#'   abbreviated English weekday.

                    		
                  

                  

                    107
                    
                    
                      
#' @param n Numeric. The nth week to return (i.e. the 1st Tuesday if `n = 1`

                    		
                  

                  

                    108
                    
                    
                      
#'   and `which = "Tues"`).

                    		
                  

                  

                    109
                    
                    
                      
#' @param call Environment. Calling environment for appropriate messages if used

                    		
                  

                  

                    110
                    
                    
                      
#'   within another function.

                    		
                  

                  

                    111
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    112
                    
                    
                      
#' @return A date

                    		
                  

                  

                    113
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    114
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    115
                    
                    
                      
#' @examples

                    		
                  

                  

                    116
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    117
                    
                    
                      
#' # Get the next first Tuesday

                    		
                  

                  

                    118
                    
                    
                      
#' next_date("2023-11-01")

                    		
                  

                  

                    119
                    
                    
                      
#' next_date("2023-11-30")

                    		
                  

                  

                    120
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    121
                    
                    
                      
#' # Get the next 3rd Tuesday

                    		
                  

                  

                    122
                    
                    
                      
#' next_date("2023-11-01", n = 3)

                    		
                  

                  

                    123
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    124
                    
                    
                      
#' # Oops

                    		
                  

                  

                    125
                    
                    
                      
#' \dontrun{

                    		
                  

                  

                    126
                    
                    
                      
#' next_date("2023-11-01", n = 5)

                    		
                  

                  

                    127
                    
                    
                      
#' }

                    		
                  

                  

                    128
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    129
                    
                    
                      
next_date <- function(

                    		
                  

                  

                    130
                    
                    
                      
  month,

                    		
                  

                  

                    131
                    
                    
                      
  which = "Tues",

                    		
                  

                  

                    132
                    
                    
                      
  n = 1,

                    		
                  

                  

                    133
                    
                    
                      
  call = rlang::caller_env()

                    		
                  

                  

                    134
                    
                    
                      
) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    135
                    1x
                    
                      
  month <- lubridate::as_date(month) + lubridate::period("1 month")

                    		
                  

                  

                    136
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    137
                    1x
                    
                      
  d <- month |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    138
                    1x
                    
                      
    lubridate::floor_date(unit = "months") |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    139
                    1x
                    
                      
    lubridate::ceiling_date(

                    		
                  

                  

                    140
                    1x
                    
                      
      unit = "weeks",

                    		
                  

                  

                    141
                    1x
                    
                      
      week_start = which,

                    		
                  

                  

                    142
                    1x
                    
                      
      change_on_boundary = FALSE

                    		
                  

                  

                    143
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    144
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    145
                    1x
                    
                      
  d <- d + lubridate::weeks(n - 1)

                    		
                  

                  

                    146
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    147
                    1x
                    
                      
  if (lubridate::month(d) != lubridate::month(month)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    148
                    !
                    
                      
    cli::cli_abort(

                    		
                  

                  

                    149
                    !
                    
                      
      "There are not {n} {format(d, '%A')}s in {format(month, '%B %Y')}",

                    		
                  

                  

                    150
                    !
                    
                      
      call = call

                    		
                  

                  

                    151
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    152
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    153
                    1x
                    
                      
  d

                    		
                  

                  

                    154
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    155
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    156
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    157
                    
                    
                      
#' Replace emoji codes with unicode

                    		
                  

                  

                    158
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    159
                    
                    
                      
#' Replaces emoji codes like :tada: with unicode like 🎉.

                    		
                  

                  

                    160
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    161
                    
                    
                      
#' @param x Character. Text string within which to replace codes

                    		
                  

                  

                    162
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    163
                    
                    
                      
#' @return  Text string with emoji unicodes

                    		
                  

                  

                    164
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    165
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    166
                    
                    
                      
#' @examples

                    		
                  

                  

                    167
                    
                    
                      
#' replace_emoji("hi :tada: testing \n\n\n Whow ! 🔗 \n\n\n :smile:")

                    		
                  

                  

                    168
                    
                    
                      
#' replace_emoji(":link:")

                    		
                  

                  

                    169
                    
                    
                      
replace_emoji <- function(x) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    170
                    6x
                    
                      
  emo <- stringr::str_extract_all(x, "\\:.+\\:") |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    171
                    6x
                    
                      
    unlist() |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    172
                    6x
                    
                      
    unique()

                    		
                  

                  

                    173
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    174
                    6x
                    
                      
  if (length(emo) > 0) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    175
                    6x
                    
                      
    emo <- stats::setNames(

                    		
                  

                  

                    176
                    6x
                    
                      
      purrr::map(

                    		
                  

                  

                    177
                    6x
                    
                      
        emo,

                    		
                  

                  

                    178
                    6x
                    
                      
        ~ pandoc::pandoc_convert(

                    		
                  

                  

                    179
                    6x
                    
                      
          text = .x,

                    		
                  

                  

                    180
                    6x
                    
                      
          from = "markdown+emoji",

                    		
                  

                  

                    181
                    6x
                    
                      
          to = "plain"

                    		
                  

                  

                    182
                    
                    
                      
        )

                    		
                  

                  

                    183
                    
                    
                      
      ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    184
                    6x
                    
                      
        unlist(),

                    		
                  

                  

                    185
                    6x
                    
                      
      nm = emo

                    		
                  

                  

                    186
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    187
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    188
                    6x
                    
                      
    x <- stringr::str_replace_all(x, emo)

                    		
                  

                  

                    189
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    190
                    6x
                    
                      
  x

                    		
                  

                  

                    191
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    192
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    193
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    194
                    
                    
                      
#' Extract YAML keys from block

                    		
                  

                  

                    195
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    196
                    
                    
                      
#' @param yaml Character. String from which to extract YAML keys

                    		
                  

                  

                    197
                    
                    
                      
#' @param trim Character. Text to remove from the YAML block before processing.

                    		
                  

                  

                    198
                    
                    
                      
#'   Usually the text that defines the block.

                    		
                  

                  

                    199
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    200
                    
                    
                      
#' @return data frame of yaml keys

                    		
                  

                  

                    201
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    202
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    203
                    
                    
                      
#' @examples

                    		
                  

                  

                    204
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    205
                    
                    
                      
#' yaml_extract("~~~start: 2023-11-12\nauthor: Steffi\n~~~")

                    		
                  

                  

                    206
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    207
                    
                    
                      
yaml_extract <- function(yaml, trim = "~~~") {

                    		
                  

                  

                    208
                    2x
                    
                      
  y <- stringr::str_remove_all(yaml, trim) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    209
                    2x
                    
                      
    yaml::yaml.load() |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    210
                    2x
                    
                      
    purrr::map_if(is.null, \(x) "") |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    211
                    2x
                    
                      
    data.frame()

                    		
                  

                  

                    212
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    213
                    
                    
                      
  # Catch common typos

                    		
                  

                  

                    214
                    2x
                    
                      
  names(y) <- tolower(names(y))

                    		
                  

                  

                    215
                    2x
                    
                      
  names(y) <- stringr::str_replace_all(

                    		
                  

                  

                    216
                    2x
                    
                      
    names(y),

                    		
                  

                  

                    217
                    2x
                    
                      
    "(reocuring)|(reoccuring)|(reocurring)",

                    		
                  

                  

                    218
                    2x
                    
                      
    "reoccurring"

                    		
                  

                  

                    219
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    220
                    2x
                    
                      
  y

                    		
                  

                  

                    221
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    222
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    223
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    224
                    
                    
                      
# LinkedIn Chars to escape

                    		
                  

                  

                    225
                    
                    
                      
escape_linkedin_chars <- function(x) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    226
                    2x
                    
                      
  chars <- c(

                    		
                  

                  

                    227
                    
                    
                      
    "\\|",

                    		
                  

                  

                    228
                    
                    
                      
    "\\{",

                    		
                  

                  

                    229
                    
                    
                      
    "\\}",

                    		
                  

                  

                    230
                    
                    
                      
    "\\@",

                    		
                  

                  

                    231
                    
                    
                      
    "\\[",

                    		
                  

                  

                    232
                    
                    
                      
    "\\]",

                    		
                  

                  

                    233
                    
                    
                      
    "\\(",

                    		
                  

                  

                    234
                    
                    
                      
    "\\)",

                    		
                  

                  

                    235
                    
                    
                      
    "\\<",

                    		
                  

                  

                    236
                    
                    
                      
    "\\>",

                    		
                  

                  

                    237
                    
                    
                      
    "\\#",

                    		
                  

                  

                    238
                    
                    
                      
    "\\\\",

                    		
                  

                  

                    239
                    
                    
                      
    "\\*",

                    		
                  

                  

                    240
                    
                    
                      
    "\\_",

                    		
                  

                  

                    241
                    
                    
                      
    "\\~"

                    		
                  

                  

                    242
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    243
                    2x
                    
                      
  p <- stats::setNames(glue::glue("\\{chars}"), chars)

                    		
                  

                  

                    244
                    2x
                    
                      
  stringr::str_replace_all(x, p)

                    		
                  

                  

                    245
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    246
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    247
                    
                    
                      
template <- function(name) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    248
                    13x
                    
                      
  name <- stringr::str_remove(name, "\\.txt$")

                    		
                  

                  

                    249
                    13x
                    
                      
  system.file(

                    		
                  

                  

                    250
                    13x
                    
                      
    "extdata",

                    		
                  

                  

                    251
                    13x
                    
                      
    "templates",

                    		
                  

                  

                    252
                    13x
                    
                      
    glue::glue("{name}.txt"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    253
                    13x
                    
                      
    package = "promoutils"

                    		
                  

                  

                    254
                    
                    
                      
  ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    255
                    13x
                    
                      
    readLines() |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    256
                    13x
                    
                      
    glue::glue_collapse(sep = "\n")

                    		
                  

                  

                    257
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    258
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    259
                    
                    
                      
copy <- function(body, what, print = FALSE) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    260
                    6x
                    
                      
  if (print) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    261
                    6x
                    
                      
    cli::cat_print(body)

                    		
                  

                  

                    262
                    6x
                    
                      
    return(invisible(body))

                    		
                  

                  

                    263
                    
                    
                      
  } else {

                    		
                  

                  

                    264
                    !
                    
                      
    clipr::write_clip(body)

                    		
                  

                  

                    265
                    !
                    
                      
    cli::cli_alert_success("Copied {what} to clipboard")

                    		
                  

                  

                    266
                    !
                    
                      
    return(invisible(body))

                    		
                  

                  

                    267
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    268
